cimbar.scanningStreamDesc: Point at the animated QR code on another device

tips.item2: Set an optional password to protect transfer data
tips.item3: Decoding requires real-time camera, screenshots won't work
tips.item4: Decrypt using the import feature or CLI tools

password.importBackupMessage: Please enter the password for the Ciphora backup file to continue importing
password.createBackupMessage: Please set a password for the backup file
password.restoreBackupMessage: Please enter the password for the backup file to continue restoring
password.exportBackupMessage: Please set a password for the export file

backend.backup_password_incorrect_or_file_corrup: Incorrect backup password or corrupted file
backend.legacy_backup_parse_failed: Failed to parse legacy backup file
backend.parse_passwordGenerator_failed: Failed to parse password generator settings

overview.title: Zero-Trust Local Encryption
overview.subtitle: All data processed locally, never uploaded
overview.desc: Ciphora uses military-grade encryption algorithms. Your master password is never stored in plain text. Even if the source code is public, attackers cannot decrypt your data without the master password.

aes.name: AES-256-GCM
aes.desc: Authenticated encryption mode, ensuring both confidentiality and integrity

argon2.name: Argon2id KDF
argon2.desc: GPU-bruteforce resistant, memory-hard key derivation function

deviceBinding.name: Device Binding
deviceBinding.desc: Unique device ID participates in key derivation to prevent cross-device attacks

totp.name: TOTP Two-Factor
totp.desc: Built-in TOTP generation and verification for secure logins

commitments.title: Security Commitments
commitments.item1: Master password is never stored in plain text, only exists briefly in memory
commitments.item2: Runs completely offline, all encryption/decryption is local
commitments.item3: Each record uses a unique random Nonce for different ciphertexts
commitments.item4: Open-source code, transparent algorithms, no security through obscurity

step1.title: Password Input
step1.desc: User enters master password, system gets unique device ID

step2.title: Argon2id Derivation
step2.desc: Derive 256-bit symmetric key with random salt via Argon2id

step3.title: AES-256-GCM Encryption
step3.desc: Generate random 96-bit Nonce, encrypt password data

step4.title: Base64 Persistence
step4.desc: Store ciphertext, Nonce, and salt encoded in local file

local.title: Fully Local
local.desc: No dependency on network services, everything on device

rust.title: Rust Memory Safety
rust.desc: Backend in Rust eliminates memory vulnerabilities at compile time

leastPriv.title: Least Privilege
leastPriv.desc: Tauri strictly limits frontend access to system resources

defense.title: Defense in Depth
defense.desc: Multi-layer security: Encryption + Auth + Device Binding

login.forgotMessage: If you forgot your master password, you can reset all data and start over
login.forgotDetail:
This operation will:
• Permanently delete all password data
• Clear all settings
• Reset application state

This action cannot be undone!

Please confirm you want to proceed.
login.resetConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all data?
login.resetConfirmDetail:
This will clear all passwords and settings, and cannot be recovered!

Click "Confirm Reset" to proceed, or "Cancel" to abort.
login.resetSuccessDetail: The application will restart, please set a new master password.
login.resetError: An error occurred during data reset

addPassword.name: Add New Password
addPassword.description: Quickly create entries, supporting Website, MFA, JSON, String, etc.

passwordCount.name: Password Count
passwordCount.description: How many passwords have you saved?

security.name: Security Encryption
security.description: Argon2id Key Derivation + AES-256-GCM offline encryption, locally stored.

exportBackup.name: Export Backup
exportBackup.description: Export encrypted backups timely to avoid data loss.

cimbar.name: QR Code Transfer
cimbar.description: Generate high-speed transfer QR code, or switch to receiving mode

setup.title: Set Master Password
setup.tagline: Offline Storage • End-to-End Encryption • Edge Security • Privacy First

hideSensitiveButtons.name: Hide Sensitive Buttons
hideSensitiveButtons.description: Hide dangerous operation buttons like delete and clear

showPasswordStrength.name: Show Password Strength
showPasswordStrength.description: Show strength indicator during password entry

autoLock.name: Auto Lock
autoLock.description: Automatically lock application after a period of inactivity

autoLockTimeout.name: Lock Timeout
autoLockTimeout.description: Set minutes of inactivity before auto locking

defaultLength.name: Default Password Length
defaultLength.description: Set the default length for generated passwords

cardOrder.name: Card Sorting Mode
cardOrder.description: Set the default display order for cards

enable.name: Enable Pagination
enable.description: Show entries in pages when there are many

pageSize.name: Items per Page
pageSize.description: Set the number of entries per page

password.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
password.error: An error occurred during password reset

donation.title: Project Details & Support
donation.description: A secure, open-source password manager supporting multiple data types and encrypted backups
donation.footer: If this helps you, welcome to support the development

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.description: The following operations are destructive, please proceed with caution

clearPasswords.name: Clear All Passwords
clearPasswords.description: This will permanently delete all password data and cannot be recovered!

resetApp.name: Reset App
resetApp.description: Clear all settings and restore to initial state
resetApp.confirm: Are you sure you want to reset the app? This will clear all settings.

resetSettings.name: Reset Settings
resetSettings.description: Restore all app settings to default values. Your passwords and groups will not be affected.
resetSettings.confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults? This action cannot be undone.

resetAllData.name: Reset All Data
resetAllData.description: Clear all password data and settings, resetting the app to its initial state. This action cannot be undone!

confirmModal.title: ⚠️ Danger Operation Warning
confirmModal.message: This operation will permanently delete all password data and cannot be recovered! If you are sure you want to proceed, please enter 'DELETE ALL' below to confirm:
